PRESS & MEDIA

Lisa Warren in the News

Press features, industry recognition, and media coverage for Lisa Warren and Neural Horizons AI.

● COVER STORY

THE PRIME TODAY · MAY 2026

The Most Influential and Dynamic Leader to Watch in 2026

"AI won't define the next generation of market leaders — execution will. The difference is no longer who adopts AI, but who knows how to operationalise it at scale."

Full feature on Lisa Warren's journey from FMCG data analytics to founding Neural Horizons AI, the launch of Zonar OS™, and why integrated AI infrastructure will define the decade ahead.

Read Full Article →

KEY QUOTES FROM THE FEATURE

"

AI is no longer a tool. It's infrastructure. The companies that understand that will lead; everyone else will follow.

On AI adoption

"

Data isn't reporting. It's leverage. Leadership often confuses having technology with using technology.

On data strategy

"

AI doesn't fail. Execution does. The future is integrated AI, embedded across the entire organisation.

On implementation

"

Culture doesn't change through messaging. It changes through proof.

On transformation

"

Ethics is not separate from strategy; it is part of it.

On governance

"

The leaders who succeed are not the most technical; they're the ones who connect technology to outcomes and move with intent.

On leadership

The Prime Today

Cover Story · May 2026
